title: Chandrawati Jain temple
tagline: Chandrawati Jain temple — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Chandrawati Jain temple is a Jain tirth located in the Chandrawati village located 23 kilometres (14 mi) from Varanasi.
overview.description: Chandrawati Jain temple is a Jain tirth located in the Chandrawati village located 23 kilometres (14 mi) from Varanasi. This place is believed to be birthplace of Chandraprabha, the 8th Thirthankara, of Jainism.

topPlaces.name: Gomti River
topPlaces.description: The Gomti, Gumti or Gomati River is a river flowing entirely within the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is a tributary of the Ganges.

topPlaces.name: Swarved Mahamandir
topPlaces.description: Swarved Mahamandir is a charitable meditation centre built in Varanasi and inaugurated by Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and with its seven-storey claims to be the biggest meditation centre in the World. The centre is built with an estimated cost of Rs 100 crores and has a seating capacity of 20,000 people at a time.

items.note: The Gomti, Gumti or Gomati River is a river flowing entirely within the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is a tributary of the Ganges.

Swarved Mahamandir is a charitable meditation centre built in Varanasi and inaugurated by Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and with its seven-storey claims to be the biggest meditation centre in the World. faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandrawati Jain temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandrawati Jain temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandrawati Jain temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (21 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandrawati Jain temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandrawati Jain temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandrawati Jain temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chandrawati Jain temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandrawati Jain temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gomti River, Swarved Mahamandir.
